steps.title: Follow the precision clue
steps.content: The passage says the Mexica could precisely identify dates such as solstices by observing the sun's position. The blank must describe a high degree of precision or accuracy in tracking time.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content: A means instability, C means ability to recover, and D means being hard to notice. None fits precise date identification. The needed word means exactness. The answer is B.
